question: Main Gaza ke liye Alkhidmat Foundation ko donation kaise de sakta hun?
expected_answer: Aap Gaza ke liye Alkhidmat Foundation ko kai tariqon se donate kar sakte hain. JazzCash ya EasyPaisa ke zariye, Donations section mein jayen, 'Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan' select karen aur payment mukammal karen. Aap alkhidmat.org/donate par debit/credit card se online bhi donate kar sakte hain. Bank transfer ke liye, Bank of Punjab mein raqam bhejen (Account Title: Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan, Account No: 5310067845100016, IBAN: PK19BPUN5310067845100016). Cheque ya bank draft ke zariye bhi donation qabool ki jati hai, aur helpline (0800 44 44 8 ya 0304 111 4 222) ke zariye ghar se collection ka bandobast kiya ja sakta hai.

question: Kya Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan mein tax se mustasna hai?
expected_answer: Ji haan, Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan FBR Act 2(36)c ke tahat tax se mustasna hai.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation ka head office kahan waqe hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation ka head office 3km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan mein waqe hai.

question: Main mazeed malumat ke liye Alkhidmat Foundation se kaise rabta kar sakta hun?
expected_answer: Aap +92 42 3802 0222 par phone kar sakte hain ya info@alkhidmat.org par email kar sakte hain, ya hamare daftar Alkhidmat Foundation Head Office, 3 Km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore, Pakistan aa sakte hain.

question: Main Alkhidmat Foundation se donation ki raseed kaise hasil kar sakta hun?
expected_answer: Aap apni transaction slip WhatsApp number +923000776016 par share kar ke donation ki raseed hasil kar sakte hain.

question: Online donation ke kaunse tareeqe dastiyab hain?
expected_answer: Aap website par card, seedha bank transfer, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, ghar se collection ya ATM card ke zariye online donate kar sakte hain.

question: Kya main internationally Alkhidmat Foundation ko donate kar sakta hun?
expected_answer: Ji haan, aap internationally Alkhidmat Foundation ko donate kar sakte hain. Un ke paas bairoon mulk muqeem atiya dehandagan ke liye USD bank accounts mojood hain jo international bank transfer ke zariye donate kar sakte hain.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation ki is waqt kaunsi hungami appeals jari hain?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation ne Punjab mein tabahkun sailab ke jawab mein fori aur jameh imdadi operation shuru kiya hai, jis mein 165 afraad janen ganwa chuke hain aur 220 makaan nuqsan mein aaye hain. Foundation tamam mutasira communities ko har mumkin imdad faraham karne par tawajja markooz kiye hue hai.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation ke bunyadi shubahjaat kya hain?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation ke bunyadi shubahjaat mein Disaster Management, sehat ki khidmaat, taleem, yateem nigahdaasht program, WASH (pani, safai aur hifzaan-e-sehat), microfinance, community services, taleemi maawnat aur wazaif, community development aur advocacy, aur aafaat mein khawateen ko baakhtiyar banana shaamil hain.

question: Main Palestine ke liye Alkhidmat Foundation ko donate kaise kar sakta hun?
expected_answer: Online donation website alkhidmat.org/donate par jayen aur 'Donate to Palestine' ka option select karen. Aap EasyPaisa app mein bhi 'Donate to Palestine' select kar sakte hain. Is ke ilawa, 'Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan' ke naam par cheque ya draft bana kar Alkhidmat Complex, 3km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan bhej sakte hain.

question: Main ghar baithe Alkhidmat Foundation ko donate kaise kar sakta hun?
expected_answer: Sarkari donation website alkhidmat.org/donate kholein. 'Quick Donate' option par click karen. 'Give Once' ya 'Give Regularly' select karen. PKR mein donation ki raqam select karen ya khud daakhil karen. Sadqa/Zakat dropdown menu se donation ki qisam select karen. 'Donate' button par click karen. Apna mukammal naam, email, phone number, mulk, shehar aur pata darj karen. Payment ka tareeqa select karen: online card, seedha bank transfer, ya ghar se collection. Payment mukammal karen.

question: Kya main apna donation cheque courier ke zariye Alkhidmat Foundation ko bhej sakta hun?
expected_answer: Ji haan, aap apna cheque ya bank draft courier ke zariye Alkhidmat Complex, 3km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan bhej sakte hain.

expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan ko USD mein aam donation dene ke liye, darj zail account par international wire transfer bhejen: Bank: Makramah Bank Limited. expected_answer: Aam GBP donation ke liye, aap Makramah Bank account number 1994426253402135802 (IBAN: PK02SUMB994434020135802) ya Meezan Bank account number 0100644437 (IBAN: PK12MEZN0002010100644437) istemal kar sakte hain. SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Main PKR mein Alkhidmat Foundation ko aam donation kaise de sakta hun?

PKR mein donation ki raqam select karen ya khud daakhil karen. Sadqa/Zakat dropdown menu se donation ki qisam select karen. 'Donate' button par click karen. Apna naam, email, phone number, mulk, shehar aur pata darj karen. Payment ka tareeqa select karen: online card, seedha bank transfer, ya ghar se collection. Payment mukammal karen.

expected_answer: Aap yateem nigahdaasht, community services ya Bano Qabil ke liye PKR Zakat darj zail tariqon se de sakte hain: Online: alkhidmat.org/donate par debit ya credit card se, 24/7 dastiyab. JazzCash: App kholein, Donations mein jayen, 'Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan' select karen aur raqam daakhil karen. EasyPaisa: App kholein, Donations mein jayen, 'Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan' select karen aur raqam daakhil karen. Ghar se collection: 0800 44 44 8 ya 0304 111 4 222 par call karen. Cheque ya draft: 'Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan' ke naam par bana kar Alkhidmat Complex, 3km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore bhejen.

expected_answer: Alkhidmat Diagnostic Center aur Blood Bank Karachi — II-A, 7/3,4,5 nazdik Enquiry Office, muqabil Model Park, Nazimabad, Karachi.

question: Alkhidmat kitni tashkheesi laboratories aur collection centers chalati hai?
Sindh mein Alkhidmat ke paas kitni ambulancein hain?
Alkhidmat kul kitne hospitals chalati hai?
Alkhidmat razakaar kya karte hain?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat razakaar mukhtalif sargarmiyyon mein hissa lete hain jin mein disaster management mein zalzalon, sailabon aur sehat ki hungami soorat-e-haal mein imdadi kaarvaiyan shamil hain. Woh hospitals, clinics aur mobile health units mein maawnat karte hain. Razakaar taleem mein bhi madad karte hain jaise ke aafat zadah ilaqon mein aarzi schools qaim karna aur wazaif faraham karna. Woh 30,000 se zaid yateem bachon ki madad karte hain aur WASH iqdamaat mein saaf pani aur safai ki suhulatein faraham karte hain. Is ke ilawa woh community services aur microfinance iqdamaat mein bhi hissa lete hain.

question: Razakaar kaun ban sakta hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan aise naujawanon aur community ke afraad ki himmat afzai karti hai jo insani khidmat, samaji falaah, community service aur doosron ki madad ke jazbe se sarshaar hon. Yeh idara khaas tor par Pakistan ke naujawanon mein razakarana khidmat ko farogh deta hai.

question: Razakaar banne ka link kya hai?
expected_answer: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdNGfhJq0TtqjC3jYK_EdYzmTug1PyuJOTWLdXRPxOef_xGOg/viewform

question: Main Alkhidmat mein razakaar kaise ban sakta hun?
expected_answer: Sarkari razakaar registration form kholein. Apni zaati aur rabta malumat darj karen. Form jama karwaen. Registration ke baad, aap ko training sessions, muhimmat, sargarmiyyon ya insani khidmat ke mansobon ke hawaale se rabta kiya ja sakta hai.

question: Alkhidmat ka markazi rabta pata kahan hai?
expected_answer: Rabta pata: 501, Quaideen Colony, nazdik Islamia College, Karachi, Pakistan.

question: Alkhidmat ke liye kaunse rabta phone numbers diye gaye hain?
expected_answer: +92 91 2263651-52 (Khyber Pakhtunkhwa), 05811-454124 (Gilgit Baltistan), +92 51 4906080 (Azad Jammu & Kashmir), +92 81 2453967 (Balochistan), +92 21 36345131 (Sindh), +92 42 35454320-22 (Central Punjab), +92 61 6510088 (South Punjab), (051) 5765605 (North Punjab).

question: Bano Qabil ke kitne IT centres hain aur kahan hain?
expected_answer: Bano Qabil Pakistan bhar mein 120 se zaid IT training marakiz ke zariye kaam karta hai, jin mein Punjab (Lahore samet), Sindh (Karachi jahan program ka aghaz hua), Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Balochistan, Gilgit Baltistan aur Azad Jammu & Kashmir mein maqamaat shamil hain.

question: Bano Qabil program ke tahat courses kitne arse ke hote hain?
expected_answer: Courses 3 maah ke hote hain.

question: Bano Qabil mein intikhab ka amal kya hai?
expected_answer: Bano Qabil mein intikhab ka amal paanch marahil par mushtamil hai: registration, ahliyat ka test, interview, classes aur graduation. Talib ilm pehle sarkari website ya Facebook page par register karte hain. Registration ke baad, shortlist kiye gaye talib ilm ek laazmi ahliyat test dete hain. Test pass karne walon ko interview ke liye bulaya jata hai. Jo talib ilm dono marahil kamyabi se mukammal karte hain, unhen apne muntakhib IT course mein daakhil kar liya jata hai.

question: Bano Qabil program mein kitne umeedwaaron ne registration karayi?
expected_answer: Bano Qabil program mein 1.2 million se zaid talib ilmon ne registration karayi hai.

question: Kya aap Bano Qabil program ke baare mein bata sakte hain?
expected_answer: Bano Qabil ek muft IT wazifa aur naujawanon ko baakhtiyar banane ka program hai jise Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan ne 2022 mein shuru kiya. Is ka maqsad Pakistani naujawanon ko muft jadeed IT taleem, digital mahaaraten, freelancing ki training aur rozgaar ke mawaqe faraham karna hai. Karachi se shuru ho kar yeh program Lahore aur doosre shahron tak phail chuka hai. Ab tak 1.2 million se zaid talib ilmon ne registration karayi hai aur 50,000 se zaid graduates IT courses mukammal kar chuke hain. Mazeed malumat ke liye: https://www.alkhidmat.org/banoqabil.

question: Online donate karne ki website kaunsi hai?
expected_answer: alkhidmat.org/donate

question: Kya aap online donation ke amal mein meri rahnumai kar sakte hain?
expected_answer: Online donate karne ke liye alkhidmat.org/donate par jayen. 'Quick Donate' par click karen aur 'Give Once' ya 'Give Regularly' select karen. PKR mein donation ki raqam select karen (5,000, 10,000, 25,000, ya 50,000) ya khud daakhil karen. Sadqa/Zakat dropdown se donation ki qisam select karen aur 'Donate' par click karen. Apna naam, email, phone number, mulk, shehar aur pata darj karen. Phir payment ka tareeqa select karen: online card, seedha bank transfer, ya ghar se collection, aur donation mukammal karen.

question: Main kahan ya kin maqasid ke liye Alkhidmat ko donate kar sakta hun?
expected_answer: Aap Alkhidmat ko yateem kafaalat, yateem nigahdaasht program, Aghosh homes, taleemi iqdamaat, disaster management, sehat ki khidmaat aur WASH program samet mukhtalif maqasid ke liye donate kar sakte hain.

question: Alkhidmat ka WASH program kya hai aur yeh kyun aham hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation ka WASH program (pani, safai aur hifzaan-e-sehat) pani ke bohran se nipTne ke liye communities ko payidar pani ke hal faraham karne ke liye waqf hai. Yeh aham hai kyunki yeh khushk saali, naqal makani aur bimari ke khatron se bachate hue communities ko barson tak saaf pani ki payidar farahami yaqeeni banata hai. Program mein bare shahron mein water filtration plants, hand pumps, shamsyi toanaai se chalne wale pumps aur door daraaz ilaqon mein saaf pani ki farahami ke mansoobe shamil hain.

question: Alkhidmat WASH program ke zariye logon ki kaise madad karti hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat WASH program ke zariye logon ko saaf peene ka pani, safai ki suhulatein aur hifzaan-e-sehat kits faraham karti hai, khaas tor par bohrani soorat-e-haal mein. Program mein bare shahron mein water filtration plants, hand pumps, shamsyi toanaai se chalne wale pumps aur Thar, Cholistan, Balochistan, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Gilgit Baltistan aur Azad Jammu & Kashmir ke door daraaz ilaqon mein saaf pani ki farahami ke mansoobe shamil hain.

question: Aghosh yateem marakiz kya hain aur yeh kahan waqe hain?
expected_answer: Aghosh yateem marakiz Alkhidmat ke yateem bachon ke liye boarding schools hain. 11 marakiz hain, jin mein Shami panah gazeenon ke bachon ke liye Turkey mein ek markaz bhi shamil hai.

question: Yateem Family Support Program ke tahat kya madad faraham ki jati hai?
expected_answer: Yateem Family Support Program ke tahat izafi 2,250 yateem bachon ko mahana maali maawnat ke saath taleem, sehat, ghizaiyat aur jazbati behbood ki suhulatein faraham ki jaengi. Alkhidmat pehle se 750 kafaalat shuda yateem bachon mein se har ek ko $50 mahana imdaad de rahi hai.

question: Alkhidmat kaunsi community services faraham karti hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat community services mein ghurbat ka khaatma, zariya-e-maash ki maawnat, maqami communities mein salahiyat saazi, disaster management, sehat ki khidmaat, taleem, yateem nigahdaasht, WASH (saaf peene ka pani aur safai ki suhulatein) aur microfinance shamil hain.

question: Mawakhat program ka maqsad kya hai?
expected_answer: Mawakhat program ka maqsad afraad ko apna chhota karobaar shuru karne ke liye zaroori wasail faraham karna hai taake community mein karobaari jazbe aur maashi khudmukhtaari ko farogh diya ja sake. Is ka hadaf Pakistan bhar mein mustahiq afraad aur baahimmat khawateen ko baizzat rozgaar faraham karna hai.

question: Mawakhat program se kaunse karobaaron ko faida hua hai?
expected_answer: Mawakhat program ke zariye maawnat yaafta karobaaron mein darzi aur kaDhai ki khidmaat, khana pakane ke karobaar, beauty salons, kiraana ki dukaanein, stationery ki dukaanein aur three-wheeler transport ke karobaar shamil hain.

question: Alkhidmat Pakistan mein aafaat ke dauran kya kirdaar ada karti hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Pakistan mein aafaat ke dauran aham kirdaar ada karti hai aur zalzalon, sailabon, bomb dhamakon aur sehat ki hungami soorat-e-haal mein sab se pehle imdaad faraham karne walon mein shamil hoti hai. Foundation poore mulk mein fori aur jameh imdadi operations shuru karti hai aur mukammal lais Disaster Responder unit tayenaat karti hai. Fori imdaad ke baad Alkhidmat bahali ke kaamon par bhi tawajja deti hai jin mein makaanon ki tameer-e-nau, medical camps aur aarzi schools ka qiyam aur sood se pak qarzon aur microfinance ke zariye zariya-e-maash ki bahali shamil hain.
